fields.title: Refactor tau agents: replace skill injection with prompt.md definitions
fields.description:
Port codex-rs subagent architecture to tau. Replace skill injection with self-contained .md files containing YAML frontmatter + system prompt (like codex oracle.md).

## Goals
- Remove skill injection from agent workers
- Define agents via prompt.md files (YAML frontmatter + system prompt body)
- Port all codex-rs agents: oracle, finder, librarian, painter, review, rush, general
- Keep existing sandbox enforcement
- Keep agents async

## Non-goals
- session_reader (internal codex tool, not needed)
- allowed_subagents nesting control (defer)

## Current state
- Tau uses TaskType + skill injection via buildWorkerSystemPrompt()
- Skills loaded from extensions/tau/skills/ or ~/.pi/agent/skills/
- Codex uses .md files with frontmatter: name, description, model, reasoning_effort, sandbox_policy, approval_policy

## Target state
- Agent definitions in extensions/tau/agents/*.md (or similar)
- Frontmatter parsed for metadata (sandbox, model, etc)
- Body used as system prompt
- TaskRegistry loads agent definitions from .md files
fields.close_reason: Epic complete: Refactored tau agents from skill injection to prompt.md definitions. All agents (oracle, finder, general, librarian, painter, review, rush) ported from codex-rs. AgentRegistry discovers .md files, AgentWorker uses definition.systemPrompt directly.
